title: GMM Decorative Melamine Tray Floral Rose Strawberry Pattern Spring Design Snack Tray Kitchen Tray (2X30CM)
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Decorative tray with spring floral pattern, featuring delicate roses, strawberries and colorful flowers on a white background
DURABLE MATERIAL: Made of high quality melamine, impact resistant and ideal for everyday kitchen use
VERSATILITY: Perfect for serving snacks, treats, snacks or as a decorative item on the table
PRACTICAL SIZE: Rounded rectangular shape with raised edges for comfortable and functional use
MAINTENANCE: Easy to clean, dishwasher safe, not suitable for microwave use
description: This elegant melamine tray is a charming addition to your tableware collection. Decorated with a delicate spring pattern, it features gorgeous roses in peach hues, vibrant red strawberries and delicate flowers creating a joyful and festive atmosphere. Rectangular shape with rounded corners makes it perfect for serving snacks, treats, decorative tray. Made from durable melamine, this tray is ideal for everyday use and is easy to clean. Italian design combines functionality and aesthetics, turning every meal into a visually pleasing experience. Perfect for breakfasts, snacks or as a decorative element on the table, this tray adds a touch of spring to your kitchen in any season. Hand washing is recommended to preserve the colour brilliance.
